title: Storage Config v1
description: User configuration for the storage layer. Lives at ~/.prompt-debugger/config.json with optional per-project override.

storage_scope.description: 'user' (default): ~/.prompt-debugger/stores/<project-key>/. 'project': <project>/.prompt-debugger/ — explicit opt-in; the store is created self-ignoring.

project_local_acknowledged.description: Must be true for storage_scope=project to take effect; set by the interactive opt-in flow.

allow_raw_saves.description: When false, raw saves are refused outright; when true, each raw save still requires per-save confirmation.

redaction_enabled.description: Safety valve for debugging redaction itself; disabling still never bypasses the per-save raw confirmation.

size_warn_records.description: Record count at which the CLI suggests 'archive'. Set from M2 FR-11 benchmarks: routine read scans are ~0.63 ms/record, so a full-history read crosses the 1-second interactive-responsiveness bound near this value (see benchmarks/perf/RESULTS.md).
